Our story

Small shopfront.
Loud flavour.

Tucked into a narrow spot on Fore Street, Copper Waves is a two-person operation punching well above its square footage. The counter's copper-tiled, the seats are limited, and the espresso machine barely gets a breather.

Regulars come for the flat whites and stay for the smoothie bowls — piled with granola, fresh fruit and the odd edible flower. Some of them arrive on four legs, and get exactly the same warm welcome.

  • ✓ Family run, front to back
  • ✓ Bowls built fresh — no two quite the same
  • ✓ One very good cafe dog, most days

Bowls, brews & bagels.
